title: Analysis of Serious Breach Cases Reported in the EU Clinical Trials Information System: Quantitative and Qualitative Assessment.
abstract: Serious breaches are significant deviations that may compromise participant safety or data integrity in clinical trials. Public reports in the EU CTIS offer a valuable, though limited, opportunity to examine reporting practices and identify potential operational gaps. This study used a mixed-methods approach to analyze publicly available CTIS serious breach notifications.
